evals.name: create-chat-room-actor
evals.prompt: I need to build a real-time chat room using Rivet Actors. It should support multiple rooms, store message history persistently, and allow users to join with a username. Can you create the backend code for this?
evals.expected_output: A working chat room actor with state persistence, connection handling, and broadcast events

assertions.name: has_state_for_messages
assertions.description: Actor has state to store messages

evals.name: actor-to-actor-communication
evals.prompt: I'm building an e-commerce system with Rivet Actors. I have an Inventory actor and an Order actor. When a new order is placed, the Order actor needs to check and reserve inventory. How do I set up actor-to-actor communication for this?
evals.expected_output: Two actors with proper registry setup and c.client() usage for cross-actor calls

evals.name: deploy-to-railway
evals.prompt: I've built my Rivet Actors backend locally and it's working great. Now I want to deploy it to Railway. What do I need to do?
evals.expected_output: Deployment instructions including Dockerfile, versioning setup, and environment variable configuration
